title: Emails and Activities - only track emails from email addresses on board?

posts.author: Linley221 (Linley Creese)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We have a board set for each of our clients to track project management plans. On each board I have a Contacts Item with each contact listed in the sub item.
Is there anyway to automate or integrate outlook so that emails from any of the listed addresses are automatically added as an update to another item?

Much appreciated!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Linley!

Have you tried an automation like this?

Let me know what you think!

posts.author: Linley221 (Linley Creese)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Charlotte, I have looked at that automation but because the email addresses are on a sub item it doesn’t recognise them

posts.author: Linley221 (Linley Creese)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Carlotte, I never got any further with this. The email addresses are on a subitem, which complicates things.
